nameMeanings.name: Whitacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Whitaker
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Whitacre in Warwickshire or High Whitaker in Lancashire, both of whose names derive from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + æcer ‘field’. The name may also be derived from Wheatacre in Norfolk or Whiteacre in Waltham (Kent), both of which derive from Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’ + æcer ‘field’. Compare Whittaker .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre was born in 1274, in England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Richard de Whitacre. She died in 1300, in Meriden, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre est née en 1274, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard de Whitacre. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Meriden, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre wurde 1274 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard de Whitacre mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Meriden, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre è nata il nel 1274 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard de Whitacre. Morì nel 1300, nel Meriden, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacreは1274年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼女はRichard de Whitacreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1300年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメリデンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre(은)는 1274년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard de Whitacre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머이든에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre nasceu em 1274, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard de Whitacre. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Meriden, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre родилась в 1274 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard de Whitacre. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности мириден, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre nació en 1274, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard de Whitacre. Murió en 1300, en Meriden, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 26 años.
